backend_modernization.objective: Move from a CLI script to a high-performance API server that manages the tree-sitter scanning and LLM interactions in an isolated environment.
features: Mount local codebase as a Docker volume for real-time scanning.
Asynchronous endpoints for deep symbol extraction (Classes/Functions).
Persistent caching of LLM relationship labels via volume-mapped JSON.
Internal routing for the 'Agentic Navigation' path discovery logic.

frontend_modernization.objective: Replace static HTML with a stateful, interactive dashboard that allows for deep hierarchical exploration without 'hairball' clutter.

features.name: Isolated Container Views
features.description: Clicking a folder clears the global view and renders only the internal files of that directory to maintain 100% readability.

features.name: On-Demand Connectivity
features.description: Edges are hidden by default. Connections are only rendered when a user toggles 'Show Relationships' or selects a specific node.

features.name: Breadcrumb Navigation
features.description: Dynamic 'Root > Folder > File' navigation bar to allow instant jumping between hierarchy levels.

features.name: GitLens-Style Heatmaps
features.description: Nodes use a dynamic gradient (Cyan to Lava Red) based on code complexity and symbol density parsed by tree-sitter.

agentic_navigation_v2.objective: Transform the map into a conversational architect that explains code flows.
features: Trace Path Explanation: Highlight a dependency chain and receive a 2-4 sentence summary of the architectural intent.
Risk Analysis: AI-flagged alerts for circular dependencies or leaky abstractions during a trace.
Search-to-Zoom: Natural language search that auto-navigates the UI to the relevant code cluster.

services.backend: Python 3.10 image with tree-sitter-language-pack and FastAPI.
services.frontend: Node.js image serving the React/Vite dashboard.
services.ollama: Localhost connection to existing Ollama service for LLM inference.
